overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white coat walking through an industrial underground facility. The character moves through a dimly lit common area with seated NPCs, ascends a metal staircase, and walks through corridors lined with large pipes toward an airlock door.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit industrial common area with a round metal table where two NPCs are seated on the left. The character heads toward a metal staircase in the center background while an NPC exits the frame to the right. Industrial pipes line the walls and the floor is concrete with metal grating sections.

reaches top of stairs and enters upper corridor

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs to reach the upper level of the facility

metal handrail along the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a metal staircase in a narrow industrial stairwell. The seated NPCs and table from the previous area pass out of view behind, while the wall pipes on the right move closer to the camera. The lighting remains artificial and dim as the character climbs toward the upper level.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor dominated by large horizontal pipes running along the right wall. Two people are seated at a table on the left side. The floor is metal grating and the corridor is lit by overhead industrial lights. The character passes the seated individuals as they continue forward.

events.description: approaching illuminated airlock doorway at end of corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the airlock door at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: large illuminated doorway with metal frame at corridor end
ventilation unit mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the corridor where an illuminated airlock door is visible. The large pipes from the previous section recede into the distance on the right, while wall panels and a ceiling vent become prominent. The seated people are left behind as the character moves toward the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility that transitions from an open common area to a restricted airlock corridor. It begins by following a character in a white coat through a concrete space with metal grating, passing a round table where NPCs are seated before heading toward a central staircase. As the character ascends the metal stairs, the common area recedes from view and the surrounding wall pipes draw closer in the narrow stairwell. The scene then shifts into a corridor dominated by large horizontal pipes and overhead industrial lighting, where the camera passes another pair of seated individuals. Finally, the pipes recede into the distance as the character moves past wall panels and a ceiling vent toward an illuminated airlock door.
